source_text:
User feedback from last week:

'I love the new dashboard but the loading time is terrible, it takes forever to load my reports.'
'The search function doesn't work properly, I can't find anything even when I know it exists.'
'Would be great if I could export my data to CSV, that would save me a lot of time.'
'The mobile version is really hard to use on my phone, the buttons are too small.'
'I wish there was a way to set reminders for important deadlines.'
